diagrams.name: agent_run_loop_non_streamed
diagrams.title: Agent Run Loop (Non-Streamed)
diagrams.description: Single-turn synchronous agent execution: input → model call → response processing → output

diagrams.name: agent_run_loop_streamed
diagrams.title: Agent Run Loop (Streamed)
diagrams.description: Streamed multi-turn agent execution: start_streaming → run_single_turn_streamed → finalize output or interruption

diagrams.name: turn_resolution_and_final_output
diagrams.title: Turn Resolution & Final Output
diagrams.description: Processing a completed model response: resolving step result, executing final output hooks, and delivering the result

diagrams.name: agent_handoff_flow
diagrams.title: Agent Handoff Flow
diagrams.description: One agent handing off control to another: detecting handoff triggers, building handoff context, transferring execution

diagrams.name: function_tool_registration_and_invocation
diagrams.title: Function Tool Registration & Invocation
diagrams.description: Registering a Python function as a tool, wrapping it with schema, and invoking it during a run

diagrams.name: tool_planning_fresh_turn
diagrams.title: Tool Planning (Fresh Turn)
diagrams.description: Building an execution plan for tool calls returned by the model on a fresh (non-resumed) turn

diagrams.name: tool_execution_approved
diagrams.title: Tool Execution (Approved Tools)
diagrams.description: Dispatching and executing approved tool calls: function tools, custom tools, and gathering results

diagrams.name: shell_and_apply_patch_execution
diagrams.title: Shell & Apply-Patch Tool Execution
diagrams.description: Executing shell commands and apply-patch operations inside sandboxed or local environments

diagrams.name: computer_use_action_execution
diagrams.title: Computer Use Action Execution
diagrams.description: Executing computer-use actions (screenshots, clicks, keyboard input) via the Playwright-backed computer interface

diagrams.name: mcp_server_tool_integration
diagrams.title: MCP Server Tool Integration
diagrams.description: Connecting to MCP servers, listing/filtering available tools, and invoking them during agent runs
diagrams.scope: MCP server lifecycle and tool dispatch

diagrams.name: hitl_interruption_flow
diagrams.title: HITL Interruption Flow
diagrams.description: Detecting tool approval requirements, building an interruption result, and suspending the run for human review

diagrams.name: hitl_resume_and_approval_flow
diagrams.title: HITL Resume & Approval Flow
diagrams.description: Resuming a suspended run after human approval or rejection: replanning, re-executing approved tools, updating run state

diagrams.name: input_guardrails_execution
diagrams.title: Input Guardrails Execution
diagrams.description: Running input guardrails in parallel before the model call: queue-based dispatch, single guardrail evaluation, tripwire detection

diagrams.name: output_guardrails_execution
diagrams.title: Output Guardrails Execution
diagrams.description: Running output guardrails after the model produces a final response, including streamed output guardrail integration

diagrams.name: trace_creation_for_agent_run
diagrams.title: Trace Creation for Agent Run
diagrams.description: Setting up trace context at run start: creating root trace, agent span, and generation/transcription spans

diagrams.name: span_export_to_backend
diagrams.title: Span Export to Backend
diagrams.description: Collecting finished spans, sanitizing large payloads, and exporting trace data to the OpenAI tracing API

diagrams.name: model_retry_flow
diagrams.title: Model Retry Flow
diagrams.description: Evaluating retry eligibility after a model error, applying backoff, and re-issuing the streaming request

diagrams.name: realtime_websocket_session
diagrams.title: Realtime WebSocket Session
diagrams.description: Establishing an OpenAI Realtime WebSocket connection, sending/receiving audio and events, and managing session state

diagrams.name: responses_websocket_session
diagrams.title: Responses WebSocket Session
diagrams.description: Running an agent turn over the OpenAI Responses API WebSocket: request preparation, event iteration, and response assembly

diagrams.name: any_llm_model_integration
diagrams.title: AnyLLM Model Integration
diagrams.description: Routing model calls to non-OpenAI LLMs via Responses API or Chat Completions API, with retry advice and streaming

diagrams.name: run_state_serialization
diagrams.title: Run State Serialization & Deserialization
diagrams.description: Serializing RunState (approvals, model responses, pending tool runs) to JSON and restoring it on resume

diagrams.name: session_persistence_flow
diagrams.title: Session Persistence Flow
diagrams.description: Saving turn items and run results to a session store, and restoring them when resuming a multi-turn conversation

diagrams.name: sandbox_session_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Sandbox Session Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Starting, probing, and shutting down a sandbox session: workspace preparation, concurrency limits, and state preservation

diagrams.name: sandbox_runtime_session_management
diagrams.title: Sandbox Runtime Session Management
diagrams.description: Acquiring, configuring, and releasing sandbox runtime sessions for agent execution, including materialization and cleanup

diagrams.name: container_sandbox_sessions
diagrams.title: Container Sandbox Sessions (Docker / Modal / E2B)
diagrams.description: Provisioning Docker, Modal, and E2B sandbox backends: workspace setup, exec, and teardown

diagrams.name: cloud_sandbox_sessions
diagrams.title: Cloud Sandbox Sessions (Blaxel / Cloudflare / Vercel / Runloop)
diagrams.description: Provisioning cloud-hosted sandbox backends: HTTP/WS session establishment, path normalization, and shutdown

diagrams.name: advanced_sqlite_memory_session
diagrams.title: Advanced SQLite Memory Session
diagrams.description: Storing and retrieving conversation items with branch/turn tracking in a SQLite-backed memory session

diagrams.name: dapr_memory_session
diagrams.title: Dapr Memory Session
diagrams.description: Storing and retrieving agent conversation state via the Dapr state store, with concurrency conflict handling

diagrams.name: run_error_handling_flow
diagrams.title: Run Error Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Catching and classifying run errors, invoking error handler callbacks, and building structured error data
diagrams.scope: Agent run error classification and recovery

diagrams.name: runloop_extension_flow
diagrams.title: Runloop Extension: Resource Query & Sandbox Agent
diagrams.description: Using the Runloop extension to build a query agent, run a sandbox agent phase, and execute resource query phases

diagrams.name: repl_demo_loop
diagrams.title: REPL Demo Loop
diagrams.description: Interactive REPL session: reading user input, invoking the agent runner, printing streamed output events in a loop
